---
name: Propose a criterion
about: Propose a new criterion for the ACG Rubric
title: "[PROPOSE] "
labels: proposal
---

## Proposed criterion

**Family:** _(SPEC / VER / AGENT / HUMAN / EVOLVE / PROV)_

**Statement:**

_(One paragraph. Written so a hostile reader cannot pretend to satisfy it by paraphrase.)_

## Failure it prevents

_(Which failure — in the wild or in an `evidence/` session — does this criterion prevent? Link to the finding.)_

## Evidence an assessor would inspect

_(What would the assessor ask to see to determine pass / partial / fail?)_

## Why this family

_(Why does this belong in the family you selected? What is the boundary with adjacent criteria?)_

## Proposed related criteria

_(Which existing criteria interact with this one? Any that would need updating if this is added?)_

---

Proposals sit open for at least 21 days before being merged. See [`GOVERNANCE.md`](../../GOVERNANCE.md).
